repos.name: palmier-io/palmier-pro
repos.desc: macOS video editor built for AI

repos.name: penpot/penpot
repos.desc: Penpot: The open-source design tool for design and code collaboration

repos.name: calesthio/OpenMontage
repos.desc: World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio.

repos.name: tursodatabase/turso
repos.desc: Turso is an in-process SQL database, compatible with SQLite.

repos.name: DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp
repos.desc: High-performance code intelligence MCP server. Indexes codebases into a persistent knowledge graph — average repo in milliseconds. 158 languages, sub-ms queries, 99% fewer tokens. Single static binary, zero dependencies.

repos.name: google-research/timesfm
repos.desc: TimesFM (Time Series Foundation Model) is a pretrained time-series foundation model developed by Google Research for time-series forecasting.

repos.name: twentyhq/twenty
repos.desc: The open alternative to Salesforce, designed for AI.

repos.name: Kong/insomnia
repos.desc: The open-source, cross-platform API client for GraphQL, REST, WebSockets, SSE and gRPC. With Cloud, Local and Git storage.

repos.name: tw93/Pake
repos.desc: 🤱🏻 Turn any webpage into a desktop app with one command.

repos.name: chopratejas/headroom
repos.desc: Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server.

repos.name: jamiepine/voicebox
repos.desc: The open-source AI voice studio. Clone, dictate, create.

repos.name: Kilo-Org/kilocode
repos.desc: Kilo is the all-in-one agentic engineering platform. Build, ship, and iterate faster with the most popular open source coding agent.

repos.name: mattpocock/skills
repos.desc: Skills for Real Engineers. Straight from my .claude directory.

repos.name: owainlewis/awesome-artificial-intelligence
repos.desc: A curated list of Artificial Intelligence (AI) courses, books, video lectures and papers.

repos.name: pppscn/SmsForwarder
repos.desc: 短信转发器——监控Android手机短信、来电、APP通知，并根据指定规则转发到其他手机：钉钉群自定义机器人、钉钉企业内机器人、企业微信群机器人、飞书机器人、企业微信应用消息、邮箱、bark、webhook、Telegram机器人、Server酱、PushPlus、手机短信等。包括主动控制服务端与客户端，让你轻松远程发短信、查短信、查通话、查话簿、查电量等。（V3.0 新增）PS.这个APK主要是学习与自用，如有BUG请提ISSUE，同时欢迎大家提PR指正
